title: Copy List with Random Pointer
pattern: Linked List â€” Hashmap Node Mapping (or Interweaving Trick)
coreIdea: Deep copy a linked list where each node has an extra random pointer to any node in the list (or null), by mapping original nodes to their copies using a hashmap, then wiring next and random pointers for the copies using that mapping.
recognitionCues: linked list with an extra pointer beyond next, pointing anywhere in the list
asks for a deep copy preserving both next and random pointer relationships
approach: First pass: create a copy of each node (value only), storing original-to-copy mapping in a hashmap. Second pass: for each original node, set its copy's next to the mapped copy of original.next, and copy's random to the mapped copy of original.random (using the hashmap for O(1) lookup).
